arts.ttl: FC Heidenheim vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Germany to face FC Heidenheim in the Europa Conference League tonight. Both teams go into Thursday’s night battle with perfect records after collecting maximum points from their three European games. The Blues top the league phase on goal difference, after netting a staggering 16 goals in three matches. arts.ttl: Chelsea won’t believe their luck if Ruben Amorim makes this transfer decision for Man United
arts.sum: New Man United manager, Ruben Amorim, is going to live or die by the transfer decisions he makes over the next few windows, and the performances of his teams. arts.ttl: Report: What people close to Deivid Washington are saying about his time at Chelsea now
Deivid Washington: Chelsea forward has two countries on radar for January loan?
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Deivid Washington reportedly has two different countries on his radar ahead of a likely loan exit from Stamford Bridge in January.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Frank Lampard named new Coventry boss as Chelsea icon returns to dugout
arts.sum: Coventry City have announced the hiring of former Chelsea boss Frank Lampard as their new manager, three weeks after the surprise sacking of Mark Robins

arts.ttl: 'For me': Enzo Maresca admits 'fantastic' Chelsea player hasn't looked as good as he did in pre-season
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has just delivered a pretty damning assessment of one Chelsea player, claiming that his form in the last few months hasn’t been as...

arts.ttl: Breaking: Coventry City confirm appointment as Frank Lampard agrees deal
arts.sum: The 46-year-old former Chelsea, Derby County and Everton boss has agreed a two and a half year deal to become the new Sky Blues head coach. Today's club press release read: " Coventry City are delighted to announce the appointment of Frank Lampard as the Club’s new Head Coach.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury news: Enzo Maresca tips duo to be fit for Aston Villa Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca suggests that he will be able to call upon two of his unavailable players for Sunday's Premier League fixture against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Chelsea are watching ‘absolutely lethal’ attacker who already has 33 caps for his country
arts.sum: Could he come in to support Jackson?

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca hands Chelsea huge triple advantage for Aston Villa as genius decision explained
arts.sum: Although Maresca has done very little with his selection here to support his claims that there isn't an 'A' and 'B' team at Chelsea currently, the benefits of having such a large squad are being born out. Chelsea have confirmed that an even more youthful than usual 21-man squad has travelled to Germany for Thursday's Conference League group phase match against Heidenheim.
